rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ENGELBERG VS. ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Charles Engelberg'S Motion For Leave To File A Motion To Compel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 29, 2015 line 1. Cross Defendant Charles Engelberg's Motion For Leave To File A Motion To Compel GRANTED. Motion to Compel shall be filed and served no later than January 30, 2014. Motion shall be calendared for hearing in department 301. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. SKAAR et al VS. THOMAS CLEMENTS LACEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 29, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT THOMAS LACEY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to submit competent evidence to create a triable issue of fact. Plaintiff's action is barred by 1-year statute of limitations. "A cause of action accrues when, under the substantive law, the wrongful act is done and liability arises, i.e., when a suit may be brought." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES LIU, M.D. VS. YORK H. LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order 1. That Property Be Sold And The Proceeds Be Divided Among The Parties In Accordance With Their Interests In The Property; 2. Appointing Referee; 3. Authorizing Referee To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement; 4. To Obtain Possession Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 29, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFF JAMES LIU, M.D.'s Motion For Order 1. That Property Be Sold And The Proceeds Be Divided Among The Parties In Accordance With Their Interests In The Property; 2. Appointing Referee; 3. Authorizing Referee To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement; 4. To Obtain Possession Of Real Property Continued to February 23, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than January 30, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of the courtesy copy of the moving papers and reply. = (501/REQ)
